title: WidgetWatch
description: Live-refresh watch — the involvedObject(s) this widget is tied to. A k8s event whose involvedObject matches one of these refetches the widget (throttled per widget). The matching TS type is WatchMatcher in src/hooks/liveRefresh.ts; widgets copy this verbatim into widgetData.watch (validate-schemas enforces no drift).

namespace.description: scope to a namespace; omit to match any

name.description: a specific object; omit to match any object of this kind ("GVR-level")
